programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.sub-title: Friend of the Family; Remains of Murder
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend helps to bring a child-murderer to justice; a mysterious set of bones puts police on the trail of a teen's killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a husband is convicted of murder, police discover that he may have been wrongly accused.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The infant subject of a child-custody dispute is found burned; a body is discovered in a home's crawlspace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Police hunt for over 15 years for a serial killer who lures women to Kansas for sadomasochistic sexual trysts at hotels; unprecedented access to surveillance photos and video from the investigation provides a glimpse inside the probe.

programme.desc: Detectives suspect that several violent crimes are connected; a maintenance man finds a body in a bathroom.

programme.desc: James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years.

programme.desc: A co-worker goes to check on a woman who failed to show up for work; a woman reports being raped in her home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Det. Vince Velazquez of Atlanta and Capt. Russell Popham of East Point, Ga., work to solve the 1995 rape and murder of 14-year-old Nacole Smith, one of Atlanta's most notorious unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A young girl is turned into a sexual slave; A young man is brainwashed ; a young woman breaks out of a religious organization she was born into.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted and raped by a serial killer; a man is trapped under the rubble from the Haitian earthquake; a woman is beaten and slashed with scissors by a neighbor.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A home invasion leaves a man fighting for his life; a boat capsizes; a woman faces a terrifying death locked in the trunk of her car.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: Masked gunmen threaten to kill a woman's daughter if she doesn't rob the bank vault where she works; two teens in a sailboat are swept out to sea for six days.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Hannah Anderson's best friend knew something was wrong when Hannah stopped responding to her texts; no one knew that Hannah had been abducted by someone close to her; the amber alert system was used for the first time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: When Deserae Turner doesn't come home after school, her mother and friends begin texting her incessantly; a massive search ensues and 47 of her friends are questioned; her Snapchat turns out to be the key to the mystery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: April Millsap's mother recalls the day she asked her 14-year-old daughter to text her when she got home from walking the dog; April never did; she sent a cryptic text to her boyfriend and disappeared.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak goes to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday, but when she is to arrive back home in Miami, her awaiting loved ones realize she never got on the plane; Carla's friends and family recount the search to find her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Residents of small-town Robeson, Penn. were stunned when 23-year-old Ashley Kline went missing on New Year's Eve; the gruesome truth rocked the community.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Rising social media influencer Alexis Murphy is on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrivea; her worried loved-ones know something was wrong; there's a crack in the case when gas station surveillance video reveals something truly bizarre.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: New Orleans EMT responders face the darkness of death and the joy of life, from treating gunshot victims and car accident patients to delivering a baby -- with one of the technicians expecting a baby of her own.
